name: Lentil & Brown Rice Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first six ingredients in a large soup pot.
2. Cover with 3 cups of water and bring to a boil.
3. Once boiling, cover and simmer for 7 to 8 minutes.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and an additional 2 cups of water.
5. Cover and simmer for 25 to 30 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
